nasb.text: Therefore I have sworn to the house of Eli that the iniquity of Eli’s house shall not be atoned for by sacrifice or offering forever.”

esv.text: Therefore I swear to the house of Eli that the iniquity of Eli’s house shall not be atoned for by sacrifice or offering forever.”

cnv.text: 所以我向以利家起了誓：‘以利家的罪孽永遠不能用祭物或供物來買贖。’”

ccb.text: 所以，我向以利家起誓说，‘靠祭物或礼物绝不能赎去以利家的罪恶。’”
